expected_effect: Recover common-spread volume while preserving adverse-selection protection through side-specific pricing.
rationale: The first inventory-skew family stayed flat because it stacked an extra skew on top of existing common divergence carry. Instead, reduce the common divergence fee and reallocate part of that pricing into a deadbanded toxic-side skew, which is closer to reservation-price control.
title: Reallocate divergence carry to toxic side
